description: Gates for ArcGIS parcel-id attach fallback (deterministic).

gates.rule: Only mutate events where attach.status == UNKNOWN and town matches param.town

gates.note: If ArcGIS returns parcels but we can't map MAP_PAR_ID->property_id, something is wrong (index mismatch or wrong layer).

gates.rule: If attached_via_arcgis > 0 then evidence.arcgis.MAP_PAR_ID must exist
